goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of work this research/project involves
Find research-related documentation, papers, or key files that describe the project's purpose
Examine specific code implementations to assess the quality and sophistication of the work

user_agent_config.personality: Wealthy benefactor interested in supporting promising research. Analytical but enthusiastic, wants to understand the substance before committing funding.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands research domains and project evaluation but does not know technical tool names or code search methodologies

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure, found relevant research documentation, and examined code implementations to make an informed funding decision
